label: Writing — Signal Dispatch corpus
summary: Thought-leadership corpus on apps/blog (deployed at blog.ninochavez.co). 7 collections totaling ~275 published artifacts — blog 229, whitepapers 12, series 8, fiction 10, presentations 9, counterpoints 3, tutorials 3, research-notes 1. v2 surfaced only 3 flagships; v3 surfaces all collections.
primary_persona: P1 Reviewer assessing voice + thought-leadership breadth + sustained writing cadence
findings_cited: Synthesis §Writing corpus is the heaviest under-represented surface
